'''Melaan Nar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] who was a member of the [[Intendant caste]]. A [[Consul/Legends|Consul]] of [[Domain Nar]], he developed a rivalry with Consul [[Von Shul|Von]] of [[Domain Shul]]. [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]], however, would have none of this and ordered the two to put aside their differences and concentrate their attentions on defeating the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].

{{Char-stub}}
